headline: Is Digital Realty (DLR) Quietly Shifting From Landlord To AI Infrastructure Platform With Its Latest Move?
summary: Digital Realty Trust has recently completed a US$2.28 billion follow-on equity offering of 12,310,249 common shares at US$185 each to help fund its expansion, including a roughly US$475 million acquisition of 1,440 acres near Kansas City for future hyperscale data center development supported by up to two gigawatts of power. By pairing this capital raise with the launch of its ServiceFabric Model Context Protocol, which aims to make its more than 800 data centers AI-native, Digital Realty is...
